title: scutellaria ghorana
intro: Scutellaria ghorana, also known as Ghora's skullcap, is a plant species belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and is native to the Himalayan region. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Scutellaria ghorana include reducing inflammation, improving cognitive function, and lowering blood sugar levels, among others. Scutellaria ghorana can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or powder, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
